# Security risks

<!-- source: 08-advanced-llm-agents.qmd (permission-before-tool-use paragraph) +
     light teaser of 12-cost-security.qmd lethal trifecta (full depth deferred to Section 4) -->

Why agents ask permission before acting, and a first look at what can go wrong when they don't.

::: {.callout-important title="Challenge" appearance="simple"}
TODO: challenge spotting a risky agent permission request.
:::
